verified.history_semantics: The normalized PR summary preserves 33 unknown or incomplete records separately from 14 hash-verified merged linkages and 29 bounded open/unmerged snapshots. The final report expressly states that unknown does not mean no change.
verified.epistemic_calibration: The merged output and final report preserve counterevidence, distinguish static declarations from runtime behavior, and do not complete a provider-retention, generalized-training, or cross-customer-pooling chain. The claim registry keeps 17 of 18 claims blocked, quarantined, or retired, and every thesis-map node remains blocked_review.
verified.final_report: Calibrated and supportable as a bounded report of the completed first-round static review; it does not claim that static saturation was established.

actionable_defects.title: No completed targeted round establishes saturation
actionable_defects.evidence: The generated-pattern sweep contains 1,212 matches, but there is no round-2 pass result that reviews and adjudicates those matches. Searching only the six already-known regex classes cannot establish that no new material pattern class or source-to-sink candidate exists.
actionable_defects.required_action: Run a bounded targeted static round over the generated matches, record reviewed/deferred receipts and candidate adjudications, and declare saturation only if that completed round yields zero new material classes and zero new source-to-sink candidates.

actionable_defects.title: Merged source-pass identifiers do not resolve
actionable_defects.evidence: round-1-merged.json names R1-W1 through R1-W6, while the six source artifacts declare pass_id values round-1-worker-1 through round-1-worker-6.
actionable_defects.required_action: Replace the six aliases with the exact declared pass IDs or add an explicit, validated alias map so merge genealogy resolves deterministically.

actionable_defects.title: Specialized runtime locators lack source-root authority
actionable_defects.evidence: specialized-runtime-validation.json cites project-local prompts, docs, and a pass result using the same bare path shape that worker findings use for pinned-upstream evidence.
actionable_defects.required_action: Add a locator authority or source_id field that distinguishes pinned upstream paths from audit-project paths, then validate both namespaces explicitly.

actionable_defects.title: Two generated match excerpts are silently truncated
actionable_defects.evidence: The records for legal-builder-hub/CLAUDE.md lines 54 and 56 contain 1,000-character excerpts rather than the complete 1,006- and 1,007-character source lines.
actionable_defects.required_action: Record explicit truncation metadata and a full-line hash, or retain the complete line, so excerpt inequality cannot be mistaken for source drift.

saturation.reason: The six-cluster synthesis is well calibrated, but the required no-new-class result must come from a completed adjudication round rather than an unreviewed, known-pattern-only match file.

publication_effect: The bounded final report may remain a candidate, but the project must not represent static research as saturated or complete until SAT-DEF-001 and SAT-DEF-002 are resolved. Release remains blocked.
